name: Risk And Compliance Screening
summary: Find and call compliance screening capabilities for entity risk checks.
description: A copy-paste recipe for discovering sanctions, adverse media, or entity screening capabilities, executing a candidate, and auditing charge outcome.

qveris.reason: Find compliance screening capabilities by natural-language intent.
Inspect required identity fields, examples, billing, and quality metadata.
Execute the selected compliance screening capability with entity details.
Verify usage and ledger records after screening execution.

network.reason: Call QVeris API endpoints for discovery, execution, and audit.

marketplace.headline: Compliance capability discovery for entity risk checks.
marketplace.audience: Risk teams and agents that need sanctions, adverse media, or entity screening APIs.

examples.name: CLI first call
examples.command: qveris init --query "sanctions screening or adverse media compliance API" --params '{"name":"Acme Trading Ltd"}' --json
